NAME: SAPALDIA
DESCRIPTION: Swiss Cohort Study on Air Pollution and Lung and Heart Diseases in Adults; longitudinal respiratory and cardiovascular phenotypes with genetic data for population and environmental health GWAS.
MANUAL_CITATION: Martin, B. W., Ackermann-Liebrich, U., Leuenberger, P., Künzli, N., Stutz, E. Z., Keller, R., ... & SAPALDIA Team (1997). SAPALDIA: methods and participation in the Swiss Cohort Study on Air Pollution and Lung and Heart Diseases in Adults. Sozial- und Präventivmedizin, 42(2), 67-84.
